Text:
What a day yesterday was, thank you to everyone who joined us for day two of the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026.

Today is our last day and we want to see as many of you as possible. Doors open at 12pm and we close at 10pm, so there is a full day to enjoy everything the festival has to offer. Do not let the weather put you off, the marquee is large, covered and there is plenty of room inside for everyone to be comfortable and dry. The selection of real ales, ciders, perries and meads is still going strong, so come and make the most of what is left.

We open at 12pm today. Last orders at 10pm.

Tickets at the door, no need to book in advance.
https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
Alt text(s): Two festival volunteers in pink Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026 t-shirts standing together behind the entry desk at Hitchin Rugby Club, with a Feed Up Warm Up donation box and festival programme bucket visible||Three smiling festival-goers inside the marquee holding glasses of beer, with the Real Ale banner visible behind them and one holding an official 2026 festival glass||Long view down the festival bar with pink-shirted volunteers serving customers, a customer in a red top in the foreground leaning on the bar, and CAMRA branding visible at the top||Large outdoor crowd of festival-goers in the evening sunshine outside the marquee at Hitchin Rugby Club, with food vendor tents and conversations throughout the field, attendees holding beers and festival programmes
